data.descriptionShort: Lift heavy, get shredded, and build strength inside and out.
data.descriptionLong: Build the body you’ve always wanted, become mentally unstoppable, and discover what it’s like to be in control of your results with the first-ever weightlifting program from Super Trainer Shaun T.

modules.categories: Strength, Muscle Building, Athletic Training, Weight Loss

modules.title: Is DIG DEEPER Right For Me?
modules.content:
DIG DEEPER and weightlifting provide lasting benefits and results—no matter where you’re starting from or what your goals are. It's intense, all-out strength training, designed to give you a total-body recomposition. A body recomposition program reshapes your body by building lean muscle mass and reducing body fat, to help reveal a stronger, shredded body. Using a variety of proven lifting techniques, you will change the way you look—and feel.

You're ready to DIG DEEPER. Lift heavy, challenge yourself, and target every muscle group to reach your peak physical and mental strength. With Shaun’s passion for helping others succeed, he makes lifting approachable and rewarding.

modules.title: What Are the DIG DEEPER Workouts Like?
modules.content:
DIG DEEPER is a 12-week program made up of 3 different lifting modalities. You’ll focus on each training style 4 weeks before moving on to the next Collection.

Additionally, there’s an optional 4th collection—“No Excuses”—for when you’re in a hurry.

Collection 1: Dynamic Circuits – Fast-paced giant-circuit workouts with higher rep counts to enhance your muscular endurance and stamina.

Collection 2: Sculpt & Define – Lift heavier with lower reps using supersets and time under tension to build muscles and definition.

Collection 3: The Build – Slow and controlled heavy lifting using drop sets and pyramids to really increase strength and gain muscle.

There are 5 lifting workouts per week, 40 to 50 minutes each. Shaun has also created optional 30-minute steady-state cardio workouts that you can incorporate into your week for an added fat-burn.

modules.title: Tools and Equipment
modules.content:
To do the program, you’ll need an adjustable bench and a wide variety of light, medium, heavy, AND superheavy dumbbells - so you can continue to challenge yourself as you get stronger!

DIG DEEPER includes a Get Started Guide, a variety of workout calendars, and dumbbell trackers. Within Nutrition, you'll also find “how to” PDFs so you can choose the nutrition and eating plan that works for you while you complete the program.

These tools are meant to help you stay on top of your workouts and maximize your results over the next 12 weeks. Download them, save them to your phone, or print them out.

modules.title: What Are the "No Excuses" Workouts?
modules.content:
DIG DEEPER comes with a “No Excuses” collection of under-25-minute lifting workouts when you're short on time.

There are 5 workouts, each focusing on a different set of muscle groups, that you can sub in at any time during the 12-week program. They feature lifting techniques used throughout DIG DEEPER and bring the same intensity as the full-length workouts.

They can also be used as a standalone collection of effective, full-body training or for an optional 6th day of lifting.

modules.title: Nourish Your Body
modules.content:
Complete your Health Esteem routine with our healthy eating plans, 2B Mindset or Portion Fix (free with a BODi subscription). Simple and satisfying, no deprivation, and all you have to do is watch a few short videos to get started. Plus, you’ll have access to over 1,000 yummy recipes!

Give your body the nutrients and fuel it needs to power through your workouts. With our Performance line, you'll power through each workout from start to finish, through recovery. Energize is a clean pre-workout formula to help give you a boost of energy and sharpened focus. Recover is a post-workout formula with 20g of protein plus antioxidants to help build muscle and alleviate post-workout soreness. And Hydrate helps you replace lost electrolytes and hydrate fast.* And with Shakeology, you get protein, antioxidants, supergreens, adaptogens, prebiotics, and more. It’s yummy superfood nutrition to help support energy, digestion, cravings, and lean muscle.

modules.title: Get the Support You Need
modules.content: Connect with your Partner to join their accountability group and get a support system you can count on. You’ll find friends to celebrate your wins and cheer you on when you need it most—or welcome you back with gentle accountability when life gets in the way. It’s your community of like-minded people who always have your back and keep you moving forward.

modules.title: Success Story: Jose L.
modules.content:
Lost 7.6lbs.

“This program put me in such a good place both mentally and physically. I was really struggling with any kind of consistency with my nutrition and fitness, and what surprised me most was that I didn't have to do much cardio to lose as much body fat as I did.”

Results vary based on starting point and effort. Results achieved in 12 weeks using DIG DEEPER.

2Y1ZDDXEx3aLPbgAHYVuoL.title: Spring Veggie Frittata with Avocado and Herbs
2Y1ZDDXEx3aLPbgAHYVuoL.descriptionLong: This bright, springtime egg frittata recipe features seasoned, sautéed asparagus, peas, and spinach, for a punch of color and flavor. Bake the veggie and egg mixture in the oven for 20 minutes until it sets and serve warm, topped with fresh avocado and herbs. Make it for a weekend breakfast, brunch, or lunch.

2Y1ZDDXEx3aLPbgAHYW2Hh.title: Ilana's Instant Pot Tuna Casserole
2Y1ZDDXEx3aLPbgAHYW2Hh.descriptionLong: Looking for a fast, healthy lunch? You won’t go wrong with Ilana’s Instant Pot Tuna Casserole. It’s loaded with vitamin-rich veggies like cremini mushrooms, shallots, carrots, and green beans, and packed with fiber-filled bean pasta and high-protein solid white tuna. It’s simple to put together, too—you just add all the ingredients to the pot and let the pressure cooker do the work. And don’t forget, no tuna casserole would be complete without some cheesy deliciousness mixed in, plus a sprinkling of crunchy toasted panko on top!

70wPDtL2JcsiAzyuFHvKcA.title: Sesame Peanut Brussels Sprouts
70wPDtL2JcsiAzyuFHvKcA.descriptionLong: Power up your plate with Sesame Peanut Brussels Sprouts for a sweet-and-savory side with lots of nutrients, tons of flavor, and a spicy little kick. Fork-tender and charred around the edges, crispy baked brussels sprouts are delectably dressed in flavors like maple syrup, peanut butter, tamari, and sriracha, then finished with a crunchy garlic topping. It’s a simply delicious side that’s easy to make in 30 minutes or less.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer and nutrition expert Autumn Calabrese is the creator of The 4 Week Gut Protocol, as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the cooking show FIXATE, and the Portion Fix eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

Bobby turned his love of cooking into a successful career. Renowned chef, he’s perfected his skills over 20 years in kitchens from New York to Italy, including many Michelin-starred restaurants. Now he brings his expertise to FIXATE, where he shows you how to make your own healthy, delicious meals.

This healthier version of the comfort food favorite kids love is made with natural ingredients like protein-packed extra-lean ground beef, whole wheat macaroni, and cheddar cheese, plus a blend of tasty seasonings. It’s a great any-night-of-the-week dinner your whole family will enjoy!

CNCDOvSh5cSE7IEumeyU51.title: Moroccan Chicken Tagine
CNCDOvSh5cSE7IEumeyU51.descriptionLong: Dinner gets an exotic twist with richly flavored Moroccan Chicken Tagine. After a quick broil, the chicken is combined with a blend of spices and aromatics then slow-braised with oranges and olives for an impressive one-pot dish that’s the perfect balance of sweet and savory. Don’t let the ingredient list or cooking time intimidate you. Once you put it in the oven this recipe is mostly hands-off. The hardest part is waiting for it to be done!

TnNSRWyhzlHZYlq6mSf5OP.descriptionLong: Embrace the burn through seven blocks of low-impact bodyweight exercises that will have your heart pounding and sweat pouring. It’s tough, but so are you, and Shaun will make sure you cross the finish line smiling and hungry for more.

TnNSRWyhzlHZYlq6mWTX1m.title: Introduction to 2B Mindset
TnNSRWyhzlHZYlq6mWTX1m.descriptionLong: 2B Mindset, created by Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, is designed to help you enjoy satisfying meals, achieve a healthy relationship with food and make reaching your goals a positive experience. This proven plan has helped thousands of Ilana’s clients reach their goals, and it’s how Ilana lost 100 lbs. and kept it off as a mother of three. With a BODi membership, you’ll get new recipes every month, plus 24/7 access to the 2B Mindset Exclusive Community, which includes ongoing support from Ilana with LIVE calls, to help you feel your best each day.

trainers.bio: Ilana Muhlstein holds a Master of Science degree in applied nutrition from Northeastern University and is a Registered Dietitian Nutritionist—the highest standard in the field of nutrition. She is also a mother of 3. She’s the creator of 2B Pregnant and the 2B Mindset eating plan, and author of the bestselling book You Can Drop It! She was an obese child who lost over 100 pounds using the principles that became 2B Mindset.

UqWqrADNH9eso22jUFV0IA.title: Meet Shaun
UqWqrADNH9eso22jUFV0IA.descriptionLong: Get to know the legendary Super Trainer Shaun T, and his journey to DIG DEEPER. You’ll hear all about how he came back from injury to unprecedented strength, and found inspiration in weightlifting, training differently than ever before. He shares all about his newfound passion in lifting and how it changed his body inside and out, how he found a partner and inspiration in his trainer Kristen, his path to bodybuilding, and how he faced challenges and adversities along the way. He came out on top, stunning the world with his total-body recomposition and now he’s sharing his method to sculpt a jaw-dropping physique because he knows you can see amazing change, too!

XHRQR29fa2SjPSTS2b3WZC.descriptionLong: Treat mom to a sweet surprise on her special day with homemade Mother’s Day Crêpe Cakes. Perfect for a Mother’s Day brunch, this delectable dessert layers on the goodness with sweet, creamy ricotta cheese and fresh strawberries on light, flavorful crêpes, finished with a drizzle of maple syrup and a minty garnish. trainers.bio: Super Trainer and nutrition expert Autumn Calabrese is the creator of The 4 Week Gut Protocol, as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the cooking show FIXATE, and the Portion Fix eating plan. He is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as FOCUS T25, Transform :20, INSANITY, CIZE, and LET’S GET UP! Whether you’re new to fitness or a lifting veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Shaun will push you to work your hardest and show you just how much you’re capable of.

vKPPpbqN0JH0WMoJVA722g.title: Quick Chocolate Overnight Oats with Shakeology Frosting
vKPPpbqN0JH0WMoJVA722g.descriptionLong: Dreams really do come true. Wake up to a rich and chocolatey breakfast that you can make in your sleep. Just mix up your oats with almond milk, cocoa powder, Collagen Boost, and stevia, pop it in the fridge, and grab some z’s. In the morning, whip up the vanilla yogurt and Shakeology frosting, add some fresh strawberries, and dig into decadent deliciousness. Loaded with protein, healthy carbohydrates, and fiber, you’ll have plenty of energy for whatever your day may bring.

vKPPpbqN0JH0WMoJVANJGY.description: This 4-week calendar uses fast-paced giant-circuit workouts with higher rep counts to enhance muscular endurance. This type of training prepares your body for lifting heavier—and for longer periods of time. It also helps with stability, proper form and technique.
